message:
fix(freeze): operand union access and large file support

- Fix operand.atom -> operand.atom_u8.atom for define_method
- Fix operand.u16 -> operand.arg for get_arg
- Fix operand.u8 -> operand.const_idx for push_const8
- Fix operand.u8/u16 -> operand.loc for get_loc/put_loc/set_loc
- Fix cfg_builder get_loc8 operand access
- Add is_trampoline check for break statements in error handlers
- Increase file read limit from 50MB to 500MB for large bundles
